title: 宝塚記念の後に・トップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide seizes a stunning victory at the
Takarazuka Kinen! She's reached the top of the
ranks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We discuss our upcoming race schedule. Narita
Brian will most likely aim for the Arima Kinen
after winning the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we decide to shoot for the autumn Tenno Sho
and work on improving Biwa Hayahide's raw
speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, I can't help but notice how
tired Biwa Hayahide is. I try to think of what I can
do to help.
